meaning: adj.风味极佳的,可口的,味美的n.使人开胃的菜肴
examples: The scent of that crispy brown turkey, fluffy mashed potatoes, savory stuffing, and assorted vegetables made my mouth water.
Our mouths and tongues have taste buds, which are receptors for the five basic flavors: sweet, salty, sour, bitter, and umami, or what is more commonly referred to as savory.
Sweet biscuits, chips and high-fat savory biscuits.
Savory custard: She mixes the flowers with eggs, chicken stock, soy sauce and diced shitake mushrooms.
Most cooks add ground pork to savory custards, but she prefers to go meatless.
